title: elymus × spurius
intro: Elymus × spurius is a hybrid plant species within the genus Elymus, commonly known as wheat-grass or cheatgrass. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Elymus × spurius include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and aiding in digestion. Elymus × spurius can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
